messages.content: Looks like you want to test the CCC pipeline. 让我先检查当前状态——看板里有没有任务、Engine 是否在跑。

input.description: Check if CCC Engine and board server are running

usage: ccc-board.py [-h] [--batch] [--file FILE] [--promote PROMOTE] [--json]
                    [{product,dev,reviewer,tester,ops,kb,regress,approve-agents,index,audit}]
ccc-board.py: error: unrecognized arguments: --list
